title: Galactiator Announces New Web3 Project 'Stellar Horizon'
summary: Galactiator, known as G.W. Jackston, has revealed a new Web3 project called Stellar Horizon. The project aims to bridge the gap between traditional gaming and blockchain technology, with a focus on user-owned digital assets.
body:
Galactiator, a prominent figure in the crypto and gaming communities, has announced a new Web3 project named Stellar Horizon. The project is designed to integrate blockchain technology with traditional gaming, allowing players to own and trade in-game assets securely on the blockchain.

Stellar Horizon will feature a play-to-earn model, enabling players to earn cryptocurrency and unique digital items through gameplay. The project is set to launch in early 2027, with a beta test phase starting later this year. Galactiator has emphasized the importance of interoperability, stating that assets from Stellar Horizon will be compatible with other blockchain games and platforms.

This project matters to everyday people because it democratizes digital ownership in gaming. Players will have true ownership of their in-game assets, which can be traded, sold, or used across different platforms. This shift could revolutionize the gaming industry by giving players more control and economic opportunities.

For those interested in participating, keep an eye out for the beta test announcement later this year. This will be the first opportunity to experience Stellar Horizon and provide feedback before the full launch. Gamers and crypto enthusiasts alike should watch for updates on how to join the beta and secure early access.
twitterThread: Galactiator just dropped Stellar Horizon, a Web3 gaming project where you OWN your in-game loot. Beta starts this year, full launch in 2027.
Stellar Horizon blends traditional gaming with blockchain, letting players earn crypto and trade digital assets across platforms. Interoperability is key—your items work in other games too.

Want in? Watch for beta test announcements. This could change gaming forever—don't miss your chance to shape the future. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-06-galactiator-announces-new-web3-project-stellar-horizon
standaloneTweet: Galactiator's new Web3 game Stellar Horizon lets you own and trade in-game items as real digital assets. Beta starts this year—don't miss out!
